title: Providing user-oriented implementation of the ELECTRE TRI method
why_it_matters_for_apss: Classic ELECTRE TRI implementation and parameter/user elicitation reference; anchors the traditional parameter-setting problem.

title: Learning parameters of MR-Sort from large sets of assignment examples
why_it_matters_for_apss: Shows fixed-model parameter learning for MR-Sort; direct baseline class for APSS.

title: Efficient and robust automated machine learning
why_it_matters_for_apss: Defines the AutoML/model-selection boundary that APSS must distinguish itself from.

title: Learning the parameters of a majority rule sorting model
why_it_matters_for_apss: Strong fixed-structure MR-Sort learning baseline; important for showing APSS is not just parameter tuning.

title: A theoretical look at ELECTRE TRI-nB and related sorting models
why_it_matters_for_apss: Clarifies sorting model structure and theoretical assumptions; helps define what APSS means by preference structure.

title: Identification of Choquet capacity in multicriteria sorting problems through stochastic inverse analysis
why_it_matters_for_apss: Nearby work for learning non-additive capacity/interactions in sorting; collision risk for APSS interaction claims.

title: Learning MR-Sort models from non-monotone data
why_it_matters_for_apss: Shows that non-monotonicity learning exists; APSS must be positioned beyond simply allowing non-monotone criteria.

title: Multiple criteria sorting models and methods: Part I
why_it_matters_for_apss: Survey anchor for sorting models and method families; helps map the APSS structure space.

title: Multiple criteria sorting models and methods: Part II
why_it_matters_for_apss: Survey anchor for algorithms and learning procedures; helps benchmark APSS against existing families.

title: Learning preference models with sparse interactions of criteria
why_it_matters_for_apss: Very close work on sparse criteria interactions; APSS must not claim sparse interaction learning itself as novel.

title: Preference disaggregation analysis with criteria selection in a regularization framework
why_it_matters_for_apss: Recent close work on criteria selection and complexity/generalization tradeoff; major collision risk for APSS.

title: Recommending multiple criteria decision analysis methods with a new taxonomy-based decision support system
why_it_matters_for_apss: Direct peer for MCDA method selection; shows method selection can be publishable when embodied as a concrete taxonomy/database/DSS rather than a vague framework.

title: Inferring an ELECTRE TRI model from assignment examples
why_it_matters_for_apss: Seminal assignment-example inference paper; no valid open PDF downloaded yet.

title: A MIP-based approach to learn MR-Sort models with single-peaked preferences
why_it_matters_for_apss: Shows non-monotone/single-peaked MR-Sort learning; important collision risk.

title: Preference disaggregation and statistical learning for multicriteria decision support: A review
why_it_matters_for_apss: Key review connecting preference disaggregation and statistical learning; use for positioning but no open PDF downloaded.
